user.title: EnergyCurb listener
user.description: Bind an HTTP listener for incoming Curb hub data. Point `border.prod.energycurb.com` at this Home Assistant host via DNS (or use a reverse proxy), then set the hub to POST to http://<ha-host>:<port>/v3/samples/<serial>.

abort.already_configured: An EnergyCurb listener is already configured on this host:port.
